title.en: RAIL VEHICLE SUSPENSIONS, e.g. UNDERFRAMES, BOGIES OR ARRANGEMENTS OF WHEEL AXLES; RAIL VEHICLES FOR USE ON TRACKS OF DIFFERENT WIDTH; PREVENTING DERAILING OF RAIL VEHICLES; WHEEL GUARDS, OBSTRUCTION REMOVERS OR THE LIKE FOR RAIL VEHICLES (for vehicles in general B60; axles or wheels B60B; vehicle tyres B60C)
Underframes (making railway vehicle underframes by forging or pressing B21K7/12)
with a single central sill
of triangulated type
specially adapted for locomotives or motor-driven railcars
Details
Types of bogies (B61F5/00 takes precedence)
with more than one axle
specially modified for carrying adjacent vehicle bodies of articulated trains
specially modified for reducing air resistance
with a separate axle for each wheel
Constructional details of bogies; Connections between bogies and vehicle underframes; Arrangements or devices for adjusting or allowing self-adjustment of wheel axles or bogies when rounding curves
Arrangements permitting limited transverse relative movements between vehicle underframe or bolster and bogie; Connections between underframes and bogies
Mounting or securing axle-boxes in vehicle or bogie underframes
Arrangements or devices for adjusting or allowing self- adjustment of wheel axles or bogies when rounding curves, e.g. sliding axles, swinging axles
Other details
Rail vehicles equipped for use on tracks of different width
Rail vehicles characterised by means for preventing derailing, e.g. by use of guide wheels
{by use of non-mechanical means, e.g. acoustic or electromagnetic devices}
Rail vehicles characterised by rail-engaging elements other than wheels, e.g. balls
Rail vehicles characterised by wheel arrangements, not otherwise provided for
Axle-boxes (mounting or securing axle-boxes B61F5/26; lubrication B61F17/00; bearings in general F16C)
with journal bearings
with roller, needle, or ball bearings
Details
Lubrication specially adapted for axle-boxes of rail vehicles (lubrication in general F16N)
with oil
with grease
with other, e.g. mixed, lubricating agents
Wheel guards; Bumpers; Obstruction removers or the like (for vehicles in general B60R19/00)
Wheel guards
Bumpers or like collision guards
Nets, catchers, or the like for catching obstacles or removing them from the track (mailbag catchers B61K1/02)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
